title: Christmas Special Delivery Red Present Sack 60cm – Festive Reusable Gift Bag with “Special Delivery” Print – Large Polyester Santa Sack for Holiday Presents
features: Festive “Special Delivery” Design – Add magic to Christmas morning with this bold red present sack featuring a fun and festive “Special Delivery” print.
Large Size for Multiple Gifts – Measuring approx. 60cm x 49cm, this roomy sack is perfect for holding presents of all shapes and sizes.
Reusable & Durable – Made from strong polyester material, this Christmas sack can be used year after year as a sustainable alternative to disposable gift bags.
Perfect for Christmas Morning – Creates excitement for children and adults alike — ideal for Santa deliveries, festive displays, and holiday décor.
Lightweight & Easy to Store – Folds flat when not in use, making it convenient to pack away with your Christmas decorations.
description: Sold: Single Approx size: 60cm x 49cm / 23.6 in x 19.3 in Material: Polyester
